values: Product and Scrum delivery tracker | 8 weeks | 4 sprints | 320 hours | Controlled pilot with 3-5 independent lawyers
Client -> Matter -> Task -> Work -> Review -> Billable -> Invoice -> Payment
Create the secure solo account foundation and reliable client/matter system.
Capture legal work from tasks, timer, manual entry, Gmail and research into one review queue.
Turn reviewed work and expenses into accurate, professional invoices.
Send invoices, record payments, report income/outstanding balances and launch the pilot safely.
Controlled pilot, not a legal ERP
Workspace A cannot read or mutate Workspace B data.
Every supported capture produces at most one work entry.
Every work entry and expense can be invoiced at most once.
Invoice totals, payment allocations and reports reconcile exactly.
Finalised invoices are locked and corrections are audited.
Backup restoration, error monitoring and production health checks pass.
All retained screens have loading, empty, error and recovery states.
No P0/P1 defect remains open at pilot launch.
Capture every piece of legal work and turn it into a paid invoice with minimal effort.

values: Four two-week sprints; 72 planned hours plus 8 hours contingency per sprint
Create the secure solo account foundation and reliable client/matter system.
Register a solo account, complete onboarding, create a client and matter, and prove workspace isolation.
Authentication, workspace scoping, client CRUD and matter CRUD pass integration tests.
Capture legal work from tasks, timer, manual entry, Gmail and research into one review queue.
Start work from a task, stop the timer, recover an offline capture and review one unified work entry.
Every supported capture source creates exactly one workspace-scoped work entry.
Turn reviewed work and expenses into accurate, professional invoices.
Review time, apply a rate, add an expense, generate and lock a GST invoice PDF.
Ready-to-bill work cannot be billed twice; invoice totals reconcile server-side.
Send invoices, record payments, report income/outstanding balances and launch the pilot safely.
Send an invoice, record a partial payment, issue a receipt and verify dashboard/report balances.
End-to-end regression, backups, monitoring and pilot onboarding gates pass.
First morning of each sprint; freeze goal and branch order
15 minutes; one shippable vertical slice and its verification command
15 minutes; update status, remaining hours, blocker and evidence
Friday, 45 minutes; split work and defend non-goals
Working demo using real APIs and sprint exit criteria
One process improvement applied in the next sprint

values: Sequential child branches from codex/solo-lawyer-mvp; update status and evidence daily
Introduce solo product mode, focused navigation and shared UX states while hiding enterprise-only modules.
Focused app shell; solo navigation; fallback states; not-found and offline states
PRODUCT_MODE configuration; route exposure map; no schema change
Only focused MVP routes appear; excluded modules cannot be reached through navigation; loading, empty, error and retry states are reusable.
Simplify registration and login to one owner account and capture practice, tax, invoice and payment defaults during onboarding.
Login; register; forgot/reset password; onboarding; owner profile; practice settings
Auth current-user routes; workspace creation; owner profile/settings; session revocation
A lawyer registers without choosing a role, receives one workspace and can complete/edit practice settings.
Enforce workspace ownership across every retained resource and migrate legacy firm records safely.
No new primary screen; access-denied and migration-safe error states
workspaceId/firmId migration; request workspace context; scoped queries; ownership validators
Workspace A cannot read or mutate Workspace B records; ownership fields cannot be supplied by clients.
Complete client and matter records for a solo practice, including contacts, GST, billing terms, court details and financial summaries.
Client list/form/detail; matter list/form/detail; client balance; matter financial summary
Client contacts/notes; matter numbering; matter billing method; scoped summaries
Client and matter CRUD works with validation, archive/reopen, search and workspace ownership.
feat(practice): complete solo clients and matters
Simplify tasks for one lawyer and allow any task to launch a pre-filled work session.
Task list; task form; task detail; My Work Today
Task CRUD; due/priority/checklist; meter context handoff
The owner can create, complete and filter tasks and launch the timer with client/matter/task context.
Harden web timer and manual entry with timezone, idle, rounding, recovery and duplicate protection.
Work Meter; current session; session history; manual time form; recovery state
Work-session lifecycle; firm timezone; idempotency; recovery; work-entry projection
Start/pause/resume/stop and manual entry each create one accurate draft work entry with recoverable failure states.
feat(work): harden timer and manual capture
Preserve differentiated Gmail and research capture while simplifying setup for one owner.
Extension setup/status; Gmail review; research review; capture mapping
Extension token; email entries; research capture; mapping and idempotent conversion
Offline captures retry safely; duplicate source references do not duplicate work; mapping updates the unified queue.
feat(capture): adapt Gmail and research for solo use
Replace approval queues with one owner-operated work review experience.
Work Entries; entry edit drawer; excluded-work filter; ready-to-bill queue
Status adapter: draft/ready_to_bill/excluded/billed; audit history; batch actions
The owner can correct duration/narrative/matter/rate, exclude work or mark it ready to bill without approval roles.
feat(work): add unified solo review queue
Resolve default, client and matter rates and create billables exactly once from reviewed work.
Rate settings; billing workbench; unbilled WIP
Effective rates; rate precedence; amount snapshot; idempotent billable conversion
Correct rate precedence applies; write-up/write-down needs a reason; one work entry produces no more than one billable.
Add reimbursable legal expenses and receipt attachments to matter billing.
Expense list; expense form; receipt preview; matter expenses
Expense model/routes; categories; tax; receipt metadata; billable conversion
An expense can be created, attached to a matter, marked reimbursable and included once in an invoice.
Create a single canonical invoice flow from ready billables with numbering, GST, discounts, locking and revisions.
Invoice list; builder; preview; detail; void/revision dialog
Invoice sequence; server totals; minor-unit money; finalise/lock; revision/void
Invoice totals reconcile; finalised invoices are immutable; work/expenses cannot be invoiced twice.
Produce one polished professional invoice PDF with solo-practice branding and payment instructions.
Invoice PDF preview; branding settings; print/download states
PDF/HTML generation; logo metadata; bank/UPI instructions
PDF matches invoice totals, includes required identity/tax/payment fields and renders consistently.
Send finalised invoices through managed email with delivery history and retry states.
Send invoice dialog; delivery timeline; resend/failure state
Email provider adapter; delivery events; audit trail; retry
A finalised invoice sends to validated recipients and records sent/failed/delivered events without duplicate sends.
Support full/partial payments, reconciliation, receipts, write-offs and accurate outstanding balances.
Payment list/form; invoice payment panel; receipt; write-off dialog; aging view
Payment allocation; invoice status recompute; receipt generation; write-off audit
Partial/full payments update outstanding balances; void invoices reject payments; receipts match cleared payments.
Give the lawyer an actionable daily dashboard plus income, WIP, invoice and outstanding reports.
Dashboard; income report; outstanding/aging; time activity; CSV export
Dashboard summary; bounded report queries; CSV exports; data-quality warnings
Dashboard values reconcile with work, invoice and payment sources for the same filters and timezone.
feat(reports): add solo income and outstanding insights
Prepare a safe controlled pilot with monitoring, backups, accessibility, mobile polish and end-to-end regression.
Onboarding checklist; support/feedback; production error states; responsive polish
Health/monitoring; backup/restore; rate limits; indexes; audit review; seed/pilot tools
All release gates pass; no P0/P1 defects; backup restore works; 3-5 pilot lawyers can onboard with documented limits.
